message:
feat(cli): enhance ntm health command with watch mode and filters

Add new features to the health command (ntm-5f1x):

- --watch / -w flag for continuous auto-refresh display
- --interval / -i flag to set refresh interval (default 5s)
- --verbose / -v flag for full error details with issue type breakdown
- --pane flag to filter to a specific pane index
- --status flag to filter by status (ok/warning/error)
- Uptime column showing agent uptime or idle time
- Restart count tracking from HealthTracker integration
- Screen clearing for clean watch mode display
- Signal handling for graceful watch mode exit
- Skip exit codes in watch mode to prevent early termination

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
